# U09 Scope

This branch is limited to:

- current progress and roadmap documentation;
- extracting full-player focus/Escape lifecycle into `useFullPlayerDialog`;
- extracting vinyl/tonearm reduced-motion animation into `useVinylMotion`;
- focused verifier coverage.

No playback, Electron, importer, index, metadata, downloader, file-operation, or layout behavior is in scope.
